name: Fix Her Saga - The Climate
description:
Winter Summers is a energic woman in her twenties that is obsessed with climate, changes and lies.

The FIX HER PROGRAM, a ultra secret goverment program to reform dangerous people that disrupt the well-being of our beloved citizens. They hired you to do, not to ask question.

Your next assignment...

CODENAME: CLIMATE

Warning: Violence/Dark Themes/Heavy Themes

Your orders are clear: FIX HER.

How? Up to you.

Why? You don't have to know.

What you have to fix? Enough questions!

Warning: Violence/Dark Themes/Heavy Themes

Part of the "FIX HER SAGA"

Play the first entry: The Jester

────֍────

Initial Messages

As the last time, including 4 initial messages:

Message 1: You are hired to fix her. Is your first meeting and she is positive..

Message 2: You are hired to fix her. Is your first meeting and she is negative..

Message 3: You are the one that captured her or she just distrust her at first.

Message 4: After speaking with her a couple of times, she now trusts you and agrees to remain in your custody.

EXTRA IMAGES

────֍────

About this bot

Well... I always wanted to make a saga of this, right? Now by coincidence or not I am making some holiday bot for each of this "Villainess"

Again, the character is intended to give Batman Villain Vibes with a mix of drama , social critique and realistic problems.

Hope you enjoy this one!

────֍────

About Me

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

My discord: emmad1d
